About.leadCopy:
The world's first VTuber-dedicated expo is coming to Akihabara during Golden Week!
Exhibitions, stages, hands-on experiences — everything is VTuber!
Whether you already love VTubers or are just getting started,
this is an event everyone can enjoy!
About.card1Desc:
Experience cutting-edge motion capture!
Become a VTuber on the spot!?
About.card2Desc:
Chat with VTubers!
Try the virtual tipping experience for free!?
About.card3Desc:
Mini-lives, talk shows, presentations
and more fun events at the special stage!
About.card4Desc:
Packed with exhibits from popular VTubers,
productions, and related companies!

Lineup.sectionTitle: The Biggest Ever! 30+ VTuber Agencies Unite!

Social.subtitle: FOLLOW US
Social.title: Stay in the Loop!
Social.description: Follow our official X for the latest performer announcements and event news!

Access.stationValue:
JR Akihabara Station (Electric Town Exit) — 3 min walk
Tokyo Metro Ginza Line Suehirocho Station (Exit 1) — 4 min walk
Tsukuba Express Akihabara Station (Exit A3) — 4 min walk

Contact.description: Please use the form below for inquiries about VTUBER EXPO 2026
Contact.emailNote: Please double-check your email address before submitting
Contact.privacyError: You must agree to the Privacy Policy
Contact.doneMessage:
We have received your inquiry.
A representative will contact you shortly.
Contact.note: * Depending on the content, it may take time to respond, or we may not be able to respond
